calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Bob Balian, CSR #5220.

Andrew A. Ford, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Atlantic Credit and Finance, Inc.
No appearnce by defendant John R. Smith.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 7, 2009.
Declaration of Damon Bailey in Lieu of Direct Testimony (CCP Section 98) was filed today, December 21, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Atlantic Credit and Finance, Inc. and against defendant John R. Smith as follows:

Principal - $10,459.18.
Interest - $1,054.51.
Attorney's Fees - $800.00.
Sanctions - $250.00.
Costs - $418.00.

Total - $12,981.69.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses; Declare Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted; And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling adopted. Plaintiffs Atlantic Credit and Fianace, Inc.'s Motion to compel response; declare request for admissions deemed admitted; and for monetary sanctions granted:
1. All objections are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Defendant shall serve full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's form interrogatories (set one) and special interrogatories (set one) within fifteen days of notice of entry of this order;
3. The matters set forth in plaintiff's request for admissions (set one) are deemed admitted.
4. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2009 Set For Trial On Dec-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Set For Trial On Oct-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
